task_description: Add SNS notifications for pipeline completion and errors. Create two encrypted SNS topics (PipelineCompleted, PipelineFailed), integrate SNS Publish tasks into the Step Functions state machine success and error paths, ensure IAM permissions follow least-privilege, and update ARCHITECTURE.md.

verification.summary: All 33 tests pass. cdk synth succeeds. Review fixes applied: (1) notifySuccessTask has Catch routing to Done for best-effort notification, (2) failure payload includes error/cause from $.errorInfo, (3) sns:Publish test asserts Resource is not wildcard, (4) issue 3 skipped by design.
